included.name: WebSocket Security Cheat Sheet — OWASP Cheat Sheet Series
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — référence normative sur l'auth WebSocket (handshake JWT, Origin validation, CSWSH), maintenue activement, scope WebSocket explicite (pas HTTP générique)

included.name: Cross-site WebSocket hijacking — PortSwigger Web Security Academy
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — traite exclusivement CSWSH (attaque sur le handshake WebSocket), couvre prévention (Origin validation, tokens CSRF), très récent et maintenu

included.name: Guards - Gateways | NestJS official documentation
included.inclusion_reason: I1 + C2 — documente l'application des guards sur les gateways WebSocket NestJS, WsException, usage de @UseGuards sur les handlers socket — scope WebSocket/NestJS strict

included.name: WebSocket Authentication in NestJS: Handling JWT and Guards
included.inclusion_reason: I1 + C2 — traite l'auth JWT sur le handshake WebSocket NestJS avec guards, adapter pattern, middleware socket.use() — scope WebSocket et NestJS, < 5 ans

included.name: The Best Way to Authenticate WebSockets in NestJS
included.inclusion_reason: I1 + C2 — analyse comparative des approches (guards seuls vs middleware afterInit), limitations des guards (pas invoqués au CONNECT), recommandation socket.use() — scope WebSocket NestJS

included.name: Securing Socket.io in NestJS with JWT and Passport
included.inclusion_reason: I1 + C2 — guide complet Socket.IO + JWT + Passport + NestJS, authentification au handshake, scope WebSocket/Socket.IO strict, < 5 ans

included.name: Overcome WebSocket's Authentication and Authorization Issues (STOMP)
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — traite auth + autorisation sur canaux STOMP (subscription filtering, interceptor), distingue bien auth WebSocket de HTTP auth — scope WebSocket/STOMP explicite

included.name: Token Authentication :: Spring Framework WebSocket/STOMP
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — documente l'auth par token sur STOMP (CONNECT frame, intercepteur, priorité sur Spring Security), scope WebSocket/STOMP explicite, < 5 ans

included.name: Authorization :: Spring Framework WebSocket/STOMP
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — documente l'autorisation des messages STOMP via ChannelInterceptor (filtrage par destination, rôle utilisateur) — scope STOMP channel authorization strict

included.name: Security Risks and Best Practices for Securing WebSocket
included.venue: IJNRD Volume 9 Issue 7 (International Journal of Novel Research and Development)
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — papier académique (IJNRD 2024) sur sécurité WebSocket incluant CSWSH, MitM, auth/autorisation — scope WebSocket security explicite, < 5 ans

included.name: Exploring the Attack Surface of WebSocket
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — analyse de la surface d'attaque WebSocket incluant auth bypass, CSWSH, protocole — scope sécurité WebSocket strict, publié 2021 (< 5 ans depuis 2026)

included.name: WebSocket Adoption and the Landscape of the Real-Time Web
included.inclusion_reason: I1 partiel — étude empirique large-scale WebSocket usage (71 637 connexions) incluant patterns d'authentification observés en production, < 5 ans

included.name: Essential guide to WebSocket authentication
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — guide complet auth WebSocket (token query param, cookie, ticket pattern), scope WebSocket auth strict (pas HTTP générique), < 5 ans, source technique de référence

included.name: WebSocket Security: Auth, TLS, CSWSH & Rate Limiting
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — couvre auth, CSWSH, TLS, rate limiting dans le contexte WebSocket — scope WebSocket security strict, source de référence du protocole

included.name: Cross-site WebSocket hijacking — Praetorian
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — analyse CSWSH avec prévention (SameSite cookies, Origin header, JWT), scope WebSocket security/auth strict, < 5 ans

included.name: Authentication - websockets library documentation
included.inclusion_reason: I1 — documentation officielle patterns d'auth WebSocket (token in URL, cookie, ticket/one-time-token), scope WebSocket auth strict — pertinent comme référence de pattern cross-langage

included.name: Delightful Engineering: Guards and Authorization for NestJS WebSockets
included.inclusion_reason: I1 + C2 — couvre guards NestJS pour WebSocket + autorisation par canal (subscription filtering), scope WebSocket/NestJS strict, < 5 ans
